title: taraxacum brevirostre var. lanatum
intro: Taraxacum brevirostre var. lanatum, also known as a hairy or woolly dandelion, is a lesser-known variety of the dandelion plant, belonging to the Asteraceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The hairy dandelion is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and providing relief from certain types of allergies. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum brevirostre var. lanatum can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which are often used to support liver health and boost the immune system.
